Description: S8 0226 TORREY WITH PATIO MP Review for Torrey SF Residence
Build a 2 new construction house on existing lot

New construction of three attached residential units, each with three bedrooms, 2.5 baths, double car garage, rear deck, concrete driveway, landscaping, and all associated utilities. Lots to be subdivided into individual parcels.

Construction of a new two story townhouse residential building on a slab foundation. Each unit will include approximately 2326sq.ft of conditioned space, with 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms per unit. The structure will be wood framed with exterior finishes consisting of vinyl siding.
